description: The narrative structure that organizes a story's sequence and pacing.

name.description: The name of the structure type, e.g. 三幕式, 起承转合, 非线性

structure_type.description: A standardized label for the structural pattern

parts.description: Ordered sections or phases that make up this structure

purpose.description: The narrative or emotional function this structure serves

example_works.description: Notable works that exemplify this narrative structure
